notes: Pinned ratchet floors that must not regress. The contract_test_count metric is the static declaration count produced by scripts/audit.mjs::countTests (matches /^\s*(it|test)\(/gm across git-tracked tests/**/*.test.* files), not the vitest runtime total; the audit uses the static count so the ratchet is deterministic without shelling into vitest. Advancement is an explicit commit action; HEAD~1 moving-window comparison is insufficient (docs-only commits between regression and audit would hide the regression). Close gates depend on this file, not on HEAD~1 alone. See specs/plans/phase-1-close-revised.md §Slice 26b and ADR-0002 Addendum A. Initial floor 574 pinned post-Slice-26b (post-Codex-fold-in) HEAD static count. Slice 33 (P2.2): +26 (plugin-surface), 574 → 727. Slice 34 (P2.3): +13 (spine-coverage), 727 → 740. Slice 35 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #1 methodology upgrade): +39 (artifact-backing-path-integrity), 740 → 779. Slice 38 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #4 HIGH 1 dispatch wiring + ADR-0008): +18 (adapter-binding-coverage), 810 → 828. Slice 39 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #5 HIGH 4 artifact-path split): +2 (empty-allowlist + terminal-green guards), 828 → 830. Slice 40 (pre-P2.4 arc-close ceremony): +5 net (two-prong Check 26 tightening +6 / −3 superseded, +2 synthetic-shape tests per convergent MED 1 / LOW 2), 830 → 835. Slice 41 (ADR-0009 adapter invocation pattern + Check 28 `checkAdapterInvocationDiscipline` binding): +9 (adapter-invocation-discipline — 6 initial + 3 Codex fold-in), 835 → 844. Slice 42 (P2.4 real agent adapter — `src/runtime/adapters/agent.ts` + `src/runtime/adapters/dispatch-materializer.ts` + Check 29 `checkAdapterImportDiscipline` import-level scan per ADR-0009 §4 Slice 42 binding + Codex Slice 42 HIGH 1-5 + MED 1-4 + LOW 1-2 fold-ins): +41 total, 844 → 885. Slice 43a (P2.5 HIGH 5 retargeting — validateWorkflowKindPolicy helper extraction per plan §Slice 40 Retargeting note / §P2.5 Additional deliverable): +15 static declarations in tests/contracts/workflow-kind-policy.test.ts, 885 → 900. Slice 43b (P2.5 runDogfood async + real-adapter seam per ADR-0007 §Amendment Slice 37 + ADR-0009 §1): +0 static declarations (behavior migration, not ratchet-count advancement; the dispatch-realness qualitative ratchet advanced on enabler grounds), 900 → 900 (no change). Slice 43c (P2.5 explore end-to-end fixture run — closes CC#P2-1 + CC#P2-2 simultaneously per ADR-0007 §Decision.1): +24 static declarations — (a) 14 in tests/runner/explore-e2e-parity.test.ts covering explore fixture Workflow + validateWorkflowKindPolicy parse, 5-step kind distribution, close-step artifact path binding, dispatch-step role + gate.pass vocabulary, sha256Hex canonical hex digest, normalizeExploreResult purity + idempotence, ISO-timestamp / UUID / receipt_id / run_id / sorted-keys normalization, golden sha256 existence + format, golden-matches-runner-placeholder binding, and the AGENT_SMOKE-gated real-subprocess end-to-end (`(AGENT_SMOKE ? describe : describe.skip)` — the `it(...)` inside the gated describe counts statically even when skipped at runtime); (b) 10 in tests/contracts/slice-43c-agent-smoke-fingerprint.test.ts covering Check 30 `checkAgentSmokeFingerprint` live-repo green/yellow, absent-file yellow, malformed-JSON red, non-object JSON red, missing commit_sha red, invalid-SHA-format red, malformed result_sha256 red, unresolvable commit red, non-ancestor-of-HEAD red, and valid-ancestor green. New audit Check 30 (`checkAgentSmokeFingerprint`) binds ADR-0007 CC#P2-2 CI-skip semantics at the governance surface; new golden fixture tests/fixtures/golden/explore/result.sha256 locks byte-shape parity on the close-step placeholder artifact; new tests/fixtures/agent-smoke/last-run.json fingerprint produced by the AGENT_SMOKE=1 run against claude CLI v2.1.117 binds commit 48bcab8 (Slice 43b) as the ancestor-of-HEAD proof point. 900 → 924. Metadata fields (schema_version, last_advanced_at, last_advanced_in_slice) are audit-enforced via validatePinnedRatchetFloorData; floor zero or negative is rejected (Codex HIGH-2 fold-in). Future slices raise the floor only as an explicit ratchet-advance act.
